## What

<!-- One or two sentences: what changes and why. -->

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests prove the change (round-trip test; zarr-python conformance case where applicable)
- [ ] `docs/SPEC.md` row updated if read/write/codec behavior changed, citing the test
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` entry added
- [ ] New public symbols have Doxygen comments; example snippets live in `examples/`
- [ ] Read-tolerances cite their interop origin in a comment and have a named regression test
